title: Python 3.9+ union type hints break on older Python
description: visualize.py:21 uses dict[str, str | None] causing TypeError on import in generate.py and tests. Add from __future__ import annotations to all type-hint files or use Dict/Optional. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-77u0
close_reason: Moved future annotations to top of visualize.py:15 and related rpl files; type aliases now compatible with older Python. pytest passed.
